name: border-beam-button
description: Shadcn Button wrapped in Border Beam: animated border glow with compact icon and text variants

registry_item.name: border-beam-button
registry_item.description: Shadcn Button wrapped in Border Beam: animated border glow with compact icon and text variants

visual_summary: The Border Beam Button is a compact button with a glow effect. It can be used as a control button or navigation button, and is suitable for applications where a subtle visual feedback is desired.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: border-beam-button
Description: The Border Beam Button is a compact button with a glow effect. It can be used as a control button or navigation button, and is suitable for applications where a subtle visual feedback is desired.
Style: minimal, dark
Interactions: animated, hover, clickable
Tags: button, compact, glow, control, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// registry/default/ui/border-beam-button.tsx
"use client"

/**
 * `border-beam` around `Button` — compact `beamSize="sm"` glow for controls.
 * `className` styles the button; `borderBeamClassName` styles the beam wrapper.
 */
import type { ComponentProps, CSSProperties } from "react"
import { forwardRef } from "react"
import {
  BorderBeam,
  type BorderBeamProps,
  type BorderBeamSize,
} from "border-beam"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"

type
